item.name: Shark Catfish
item.description:
The imposing dorsal fin of this freshwater fish earned this fish its fearsome appellation.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: Records indicate that Urqopacha may once have been part of the ocean, leading some scholars to surmise that this wavekin is a descendant of seafaring sharks. Its pointed dorsal fin and sleek form do much to give credence to the notion.
